full_text:
Teng Fanglan “Lady Teng” 滕芳蘭
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Teng Fanglan (滕芳蘭)aka“Lady Teng”. Fell out of favour due to her father’s protests about Sun Hao’s rule. Teng Fanglan was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Teng Fanglan lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
